scenes.narration: In the beginning, there was nothing. No stars. No sky. No earth. Just God.
scenes.image_prompt: Vast empty dark space with only a single soft golden glow in the middle, peaceful mysterious mood, colorful bible storybook illustration, cosmic style

scenes.narration: Day one — God said let there be light. And light exploded across the darkness.
scenes.image_prompt: Brilliant golden light bursting outward from a single point across a dark cosmic sky, stars beginning to appear, colorful bible storybook illustration, epic style

scenes.narration: Day two — God made the sky. Big, blue, and full of space for what came next.
scenes.image_prompt: Beautiful bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds forming from swirling mist, sunshine breaking through, colorful bible storybook illustration, cheerful style

scenes.narration: Day three — land and sea. Mountains, rivers, trees, flowers, every plant that grows.
scenes.image_prompt: Lush green mountains rising from blue oceans, colorful flowers and tall trees sprouting everywhere, waterfalls flowing, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Day four — the sun, the moon, and a sky full of stars.
scenes.image_prompt: Bright golden sun and silver moon together in a sky, countless twinkling stars scattered across, earth visible below, colorful magical bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Day five — God filled the seas with fish and the skies with birds of every color.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful fish swimming in bright blue seas, flocks of beautiful birds soaring through the sky, bright tropical colors, cheerful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Day six — every animal on land. Lions, elephants, rabbits, dogs. Then God made people.
scenes.image_prompt: Many different animals gathered together in a beautiful garden — lions, elephants, giraffes, rabbits, dogs — with Adam and Eve standing among them, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God looked at everything He had made. And He said — it is very good.
scenes.image_prompt: Beautiful earth glowing warmly with golden light from above, all of creation visible together in harmony, peaceful joyful mood, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Day seven — God rested. Because even good work needs a good rest.
scenes.image_prompt: Peaceful serene landscape at sunset with all animals resting, soft golden light, warm colors, colorful bible storybook illustration, calm restful mood
